name: hoxca_chr23
description: hoxca cluster on chr23; sister to hoxcb; retains hoxc1a, c3a, c4a, c5a, c6a, c8a, c9a, c10a, c11a, c12a, c13a. Eight zebrafish hox clusters (hoxaa/ab, hoxba/bb, hoxca/cb, hoxda/db) arose from the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication (TGD/3R) ~320-350 Mya. Each cluster spans ~100-150 kb and contains 5-13 hox paralogs of the original ~13-member tetrapod cluster. Ohnolog identity within a cluster pair is 60-85% in coding regions but conserved ~75-95% in microRNAs (mir-10, mir-196).
expected_copy_count: 1 cluster per haplotype, paired with a sister TGD-ohnolog cluster on a different chromosome
